design_plan: rng=42; hero_math=1120px max-width, 2–3 lines; AIDA checked; dense grids use grid-auto-flow:dense; buttons contrast verified; competitors label sweep complete.
headline: Personal AI Agent Market Brief

site_brief.audience: buyers and builders tracking personal AI agents
site_brief.goal: Create a frequently refreshed editorial blog homepage with a lead analysis, short posts, source cards, and a clear Super perspective on why computer-use caching makes repeated agent work cheaper and better.
site_brief.title: Personal AI Agent Market Brief

summary: A frequently refreshed editorial briefing for buyers and builders tracking personal AI agents — with clear evidence from current reporting, fair competitor context (Folk, Orchids, Siri, ChatGPT, Gemini, Grok), and a Super perspective on why real computer-use agents with a reusable computer-use cache win on repeated workflows.
